title: PATH_A_JEST_ESM_CONFIG_FIX

new_errors.msg: Property 'claude_code' does not exist on type 'typeof ExecutorType'. Did you mean 'CLAUDE_CODE'?

lane_4_error_classification.ts1343_method: ESM module flag via NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' + isolatedModules=false

lane_5_key_discovery.ts1343_root_cause: ts-jest diagnostics engine needed NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' to properly resolve import.meta.url in ESM context. Without this flag, ts-jest's type-checking fails at import.meta before applying the module setting from tsconfig.
lane_5_key_discovery.tsconfig_jest_json_standalone: Created standalone tsconfig.jest.json without 'extends' to avoid inheriting problematic settings from root tsconfig.json
lane_5_key_discovery.isolated_modules_effect: Enabled isolatedModules:true caused ts-jest to skip full type-checking and emit raw JS, triggering SyntaxError: __filename already declared. ts-jest diagnostics were suppressed, bypassing type checks entirely.

lane_7_next_phase.reason: TS1343 resolved with NODE_OPTIONS flag; coordinator.ts has pre-existing type errors (TS2304, TS18048) that were masked by TS1343. R151E2 must fix coordinator.ts type errors before tests can run.

note: NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' was needed but not set persistently — only passed inline per smoke run
